R1.title: Wire scarab-types into trinity-bootstrap CLI
R1.desc: Replace string-based --codename matching in .trinity/bin/trinity-bootstrap/src/main.rs with typed Term enum + ring scarabs

R2.title: ScarabType integration into Tailscale mesh ACL
R2.desc: Tag each Tailscale node with one TermScarab so the ACL key can be derived from the typed scarab rather than free-form tags
R2.why: Brings Wave 4 27-Coptic agent grid under the type system

R3.title: Ring-architecture lint coverage
R3.desc: Add SILVER-RING-DR-04 RuleEngine pass over crates/trios-scarab-types/rings/* to confirm I5 + R-RING-DEP-002
R3.why: Doctor sees the new rings; closes the feedback loop
